scripts.test: npm run build:plugins && node --test packages/polycli-utils/test/*.test.js packages/polycli-timing/test/*.test.js packages/polycli-runtime/test/*.test.js plugins/polycli/scripts/tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.release:check: npm test && claude plugin validate .claude-plugin/marketplace.json && claude plugin validate plugins/polycli/.claude-plugin/plugin.json && npm publish ./plugins/polycli-opencode --dry-run --access public
